name: bootstrap-load
description: Immutable kernel verb. Not a skill. Hardcoded in runtime image. Loads and locks 9 universal skills from signed manifest.

manifest_path.description: Path to signed bootstrap manifest JSON

root_keys_path.description: Path to root public keys for signature verification

step_1.name: LOAD_MANIFEST
step_1.failure: ABORT + audit: manifest file not found or malformed JSON

step_2.name: VERIFY_SCHEMA
checks: each skill has name, layer, phase, hash

step_3.name: VERIFY_SIGNATURES
step_3.action: Verify at least 1 root signature over content_hash
checks: Load root public keys from root_keys_path
At least 1 valid signature required (sovereign key preferred)
step_3.failure: ABORT + audit: no valid signature found

step_4.name: VERIFY_SKILL_HASHES
step_4.action: For each skill in universal_skills, verify file hash
checks: Skill file exists at expected path
No extra files in skill directory beyond SKILL.md

step_5.name: SELF_HOST_TEST
checks: Verify each skill has valid 3-axis manifest (invariant/bridge/contrast)
Verify no skill references a kernel verb that doesn't exist
Verify veto-generator contract: substrates don't generate, domains don't veto

step_6.name: LOAD_AND_LOCK
step_6.action: Atomically load 9 skills into agent runtime
checks: Each phase gate must pass before next
Mark all other skill YAML as QUARANTINED
step_6.failure: ABORT + audit: load failed at phase N

step_7.name: LEDGER_BOOT
step_7.action: Append boot event to audit ledger
step_7.failure: WARN (non-blocking): ledger append failed, boot continues

failure_modes.manifest_missing: Refuse to run any external skill. Emit audit event. Require sovereign intervention.
failure_modes.signature_invalid: Refuse to load. Treat as unverified external signal.
failure_modes.hash_mismatch: Refuse to load. Possible tampering. Alert kernel steward.
failure_modes.self_host_fail: Refuse to load. Skill system inconsistent. Alert governance council.
failure_modes.phase_gate_fail: HOLD at failed phase. Do not skip. Require human review.

security.root_keys_immutable: Root keys embedded in runtime image, not loaded from disk
security.manifest_is_data: Manifest is JSON data, not executable code
security.no_skill_can_override: No skill YAML can override bootstrap-load behavior
security.quarantine_until_ready: All external skills quarantined until phase 8 completes
